artifact.summary: Starship Command is the drydock command package for U.S.S. Wayfarer. Its current role is bounded mission routing and artifact generation, not an autonomous runtime.
artifact.classification: U.S.S. Wayfarer ship-local command package inside gopher-workbench-mcp.
known_risks: Mission dossiers are temporary assignments and must not become the ship identity.
Local model and GUI operations remain drydock workflows with explicit authorization boundaries.
artifact.recommended_next_action: Use this survey dossier loop as the first proof that Wayfarer can complete one real mission.
evidence: starship_command\README.md: declares Starship Command Operations V1.
starship_command\command_registry.yaml: present as a known authority file.
starship_command\starship_core.py: present as a known authority file.
